programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Everything seems like business as usual in West Covina, Calif., until a crazy-looking vintage Mercury Zephyr pulls up, revealing an old friend; Darrell and his buddy stumble over the ultimate sketch artist; Ivy and his son can't seem to pick a lane.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers descend upon Riverside, Calif., where Mary hopes to dial up some luck and Brandi tries to stay positive for Jarrod.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers trek to Murrieta, Calif.; Jeff Jarred resurfaces, but that doesn't sit well with the Dotsons; Barry Weiss figures a couple of things out; Jarrod and Brandi gamble on a unit and the results are electric.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell looks to smoke the competition when the auction action rolls into Moreno Valley, Calif.; Mary attempts to wrangle information from her more experienced colleagues.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley's plans to sell their home in Auburn, Washington are thrown into chaos when the property is overrun by intruders; when Flash and his team arrive to remove the squatters, what should be a routine civil matter quickly turns criminal, as police descend on the property upending the entire operation.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter; but what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, health issues forced Zachary out of his dream home; he rented it to seemingly trustworthy tenants-only to realize they were alleged serial squatters who stopped paying and refused to leave; in one of his toughest fights yet, can Flash and his team take this home back?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash heads to Philadelphia to help Paul, who returns from a stint in Vegas to start a family with his fiancée, only to find a stranger has taken over his Pennsylvania home; when Flash confronts multiple occupants, tensions mount, culminating in a boiling standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In New York, Maria turns part of her home into an apartment for her grandson-but everything unravels when a negligent tenant living under the same roof as her, refuses to vacate; after barricading the door and cutting off access to her own space, Flash and his team face the escalating battle.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: A young couple in Philadelphia lists their home for sale, only to find a squatter already living in it; when confronted by Flash's team, he is completely shocked and produces a fraudulent lease; but can Flash see through the scam and help the homeowners take back what's rightfully theirs?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: During renovations, Andrew's Philadelphia home was taken over by squatters who moved in, changed the locks, and installed security cameras; what begins as a straightforward case quickly escalates into a tense standoff with authorities, as Flash and his team attempt to reclaim the property without any help from the neighborhood.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A Florida family in dispute with their neighbor over noise is appalled to learn what the chemistry student is injecting under their door; a neighbor is the opposite of Minnesota nice when he accuses a man of not keeping his dogs out of her yard.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A muscle man's meltdown outside a Southern California gym tests the friendship of two neighbors; a Chicago woman confronts an 11-year-old neighbor who she believes has a gun.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Angry parents descend on a parked school bus when the driver refuses to let off the children; a quiet neighborhood goes to war with a noisy birthday parade; a kayaker uses a paddle to defend himself from a belligerent neighbor.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An Atlanta woman keeps her entire neighborhood awake as she throws out her cheating boyfriend and all his belongings; a swindler in Long Island, N.Y., learns to never mess with Grandma.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A Minnesota woman and her newborn baby are terrified by a man who enters their home with a loaded shotgun; in Florida, a man walking his dog is confronted by an angry neighbor who doesn't want the pup's poop on his lawn; and two escaped goats wreak havoc in an Arizona neighborhood.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A gardener accidentally weed-whacks the neighbor's flowers and faces swift retaliation; a young woman is tormented by her next-door neighbor after spurning his romantic advances.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A long-standing feud over lake access between Michigan neighbors ends with a swinging weed whacker; a rogue wave in California floods the streets and sends the neighborhood running; a sleeping North Carolina family is awoken by the sound of gunshots.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman in a 55+ community in Florida finds herself in a showdown with the property manager over a security camera; an Atlanta man is stunned when his downstairs neighbor complains about loud footsteps and bathroom noises.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An Illinois man gets threatened by his landlord's son over a lease dispute; two women in Oklahoma have an argument over the right to cook on a charcoal grill; a neighbor loses his temper over parking in Alexandria, Va.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A South Pasadena woman becomes enraged when a film crew shoots a commercial on her street; a dispute over dogs between neighboring residents in Indiana sparks a feud with an unexpected twist.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Massachusetts, a mom insists her eight children do not make a noise during the quiet hours, but according to the neighbors, they get no peace; in California, a woman brandishes a gun after blaming the neighbor's cat.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Two neighbors repeatedly clash while building their dream homes in the Arizona desert; an amateur pilot narrowly escapes death in Virginia when he crashes his plane in a neighbor's yard; a man in Florida accuses his neighbors of flooding his lawn.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Florida, a man's refusal to move his van from the middle of the road quickly lands him in handcuffs; in Pennsylvania, a Halloween party takes a terrifying turn when an angry man crashes through the front door; and in Washington state, a heated confrontation erupts when a vocal protester targets a dog owner.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Oregon, a family is stunned to learn they've been living next door to a wanted felon; on a California beach, a man flying a remote-controlled plane clashes with a neighbor; and in North Carolina, a volunteer firefighter races home after his doorbell camera alerts him to a possible intruder.

programme.title: Chateau DIY

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Six new teams take on citrus tarts and childhood-inspired chocolate fudgey showpieces. Whose gooey fudge will impress a judge, and whose tart will fall apart.

programme.title: The Light in the Hall: Still Waters
programme.desc: Gripping drama of protest, guilt and reckoning. When Rhys returns to Llanemlyn decades after being jailed for his cousin's death, buried truths begin to surface.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode meets people who've taken big risks and explores how it's affected their lives. Motorbikers James and Peter are both rushed in. Ex-miner Alfred has severe chest pain.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Sunny is rushed to Queen's with multiple stab wounds. Tyler's hurt his foot playing football. And doctors are concerned about an 87-year-old woman who's coughing up blood.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Robin has an antique desk delivered to Rebecca as a gift and hints at the possibility of a ring hidden in it. Confusion arises when Norm fires his secretary.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Robin lets Sam sail his yacht in a regatta with a big cash prize. But Sam, Carla and Norm make a shocking discovery on board.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers that the diamond in the engagement ring he bought Debra is a fake, so he decides to get it changed without her knowing - a potentially expensive mistake..

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When the family's cable television stops working, they resort to a game of Scruples - accompanied by inevitable arguments.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray changes his ways after Debra accuses him of being too pessimistic, but his nearest and dearest reckon he's become a bighead.
